prompt:
A clear or frosted pump bottle of mild liquid hand soap sitting next to a sink, with a soft-colored soap visible inside and a single pump head on top. A clean hand towel and a running faucet or basin are partially visible in the background, suggesting that the soap is used for washing hands before treating a wound. The label on the bottle is abstract, showing only simple shapes and a droplet icon, with no readable text or branding.

Near-future solarpunk bathroom or wash-station aesthetic with warm, soft lighting, a bit of greenery, and clean ceramic or metal fixtures. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible writing on the bottle. The composition should clearly communicate that this is mild liquid soap for cleaning skin.
